titleEn: Vietnam farm gains humane certification for cage-free eggs
titleZh: 越南农场获得人道认证，生产非笼养鸡蛋
summaryZh: 越南Nguyen Gia畜牧生产合作社在Global Food Partners支持下，将5万只蛋鸡转为非笼养系统，并获得Certified Humane人道认证。该认证标志着越南养殖业在动物福利和可持续生产方面取得进展，满足了万豪、雅高、希尔顿等国际酒店及食品企业对非笼养鸡蛋的采购需求。合作社通过销售非笼养信用额度实现可持续增长，并计划进一步扩大非笼养运营。
featuredReason: 该新闻展示了越南养殖业向非笼养系统转型的实践案例，涉及动物福利认证、市场对接和可持续增长模式，对关注禽业福利养殖和供应链升级的智慧畜牧从业者具有参考价值。
contentFull: Egg layers Production types Cage-free eggs Vietnam farm gains humane certification for cage-free eggs Move supports supply as firms expand cage-free sourcing 3 April 2026 1 minute read By: Global Ag Media Asia Global Food Partners (GFP) and Certified Humane marked the certification of the Nguyen Gia Livestock Production Cooperative under the Certified Humane program, a standard for farm animal welfare, according to a press release from Global Food Partners. The certification follows a partnership launched in 2024 between GFP and the Cooperative to transition its 50,000-hen flock to a cage-free system. GFP provided technical support during the transition, including barn retrofitting, implementation of animal welfare practices, and preparation for certification."Our partnership and this certification are powerful examples of how producers in Vietnam can successfully transition to cage-free systems, expand market access, and meet the growing demand from food and hospitality businesses,” said Jayasimha Nuggehalli, chief program officer and co-founder of Global Food Partners. “As companies accelerate progress toward their cage-free commitments and reporting, having reliable, locally produced supply is more important than ever."“Transitioning to cage-free production and achieving Certified Humane certification has opened new opportunities for our cooperative," said Mr. Tue, leader of Nguyen Gia Livestock Production Cooperative. "With support from Global Food Partners, we’ve improved animal welfare while strengthening our business and accessing new markets. The ability to sell cage-free credits has also helped us grow sustainably, enabling us to expand our cage-free operations and implement best practices on our farm."The certification comes as food and hospitality companies in Vietnam and across Asia, including Marriott International, Accor, Hilton, Mondelez International and Compass Group, expand cage-free sourcing.The milestone was marked at a Cage-Free Meet co-hosted by GFP and the Nguyen Gia Livestock Production Cooperative in Hung Yen Province, where cooperative members and local producers discussed cage-free production and steps to transition. The event was also attended by Tuan Manh Breeding Company, an egg distributor in northern Vietnam. translationZh:
Global Food Partners (GFP) 与 Certified Humane 宣布，Nguyen Gia 畜牧生产合作社已通过 Certified Humane 项目认证，该项目是农场动物福利标准，根据 Global Food Partners 发布的新闻稿。该认证是在 GFP 与该合作社于 2024 年启动合作之后进行的，旨在将其 50,000 只蛋鸡群转变为非笼养系统。GFP 在转型过程中提供了技术支持，包括鸡舍改造、动物福利实践的实施以及认证准备。

“我们的合作和此次认证是越南生产商成功转型为非笼养系统、扩大市场准入并满足食品和酒店企业日益增长需求的强有力例证，”Global Food Partners 首席项目官兼联合创始人 Jayasimha Nuggehalli 表示。“随着公司加速推进其非笼养承诺和报告，拥有可靠的本地产供应比以往任何时候都更加重要。”

“转型为非笼养生产并获得 Certified Humane 认证为我们的合作社打开了新的机遇，”Nguyen Gia 畜牧生产合作社负责人 Tue 先生表示。“在 Global Food Partners 的支持下，我们改善了动物福利，同时加强了业务并进入了新市场。销售非笼养信用额度的能力也帮助我们实现可持续增长，使我们能够扩大非笼养运营并在农场实施最佳实践。”

此次认证正值越南及亚洲各地的食品和酒店公司（包括万豪国际、雅高、希尔顿、亿滋国际和爱玛客）扩大非笼养采购之际。

这一里程碑是在 GFP 与 Nguyen Gia 畜牧生产合作社在兴安省共同举办的“非笼养会议”上庆祝的，合作社成员和当地生产商讨论了非笼养生产及转型步骤。越南北部一家鸡蛋分销商 Tuan Manh Breeding Company 也出席了此次活动。
contentHtml:
Vietnam farm gains humane certification for cage-free eggs 
Move supports supply as firms expand cage-free sourcing
